scripts.install-all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../agent && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:agent"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.setup: npm run install-all && cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev --name init
